title: [v1.0.0] [Backend] Setup core FastAPI app and database models
body:
### User Story
As a developer, I want a structured FastAPI application and database session configuration so that I can manage search configurations and store jobs.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] FastAPI app initialized in `api/main.py`
- [ ] `SearchQuery` and `JobListing` tables declared in `core/models.py`
- [ ] SQLite/PostgreSQL engine and session pool configured in `core/database.py`
- [ ] `/docs` endpoint loads interactive Swagger documentation successfully

title: [v1.0.0] [Scrapers] Implement WeWorkRemotely and Gupy Spiders
body:
### User Story
As a job seeker, I want the system to crawl WeWorkRemotely RSS and Gupy search API so that I can collect tech jobs in Brazil/remote.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `BaseSpider` defined with `search()` abstract method
- [ ] `WeWorkRemotelySpider` successfully parses jobs from the RSS feed
- [ ] `GupySpider` successfully parses jobs from the portal API endpoint
- [ ] Standardized dictionaries returned: `{title, company, location_raw, description, source_url}`

title: [v1.0.0] [Ingestion] Implement Hash Deduplication & Background Workers
body:
### User Story
As a user, I want the scraping jobs to run asynchronously and deduplicate entries so that I do not see the same job multiple times.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Deterministic SHA-256 hash generated from `normalized_title + company + remote_status`
- [ ] Redis Queue (RQ) worker correctly schedules and executes crawler background tasks
- [ ] Conflicting duplicate listings perform an upsert (update date/description) instead of duplicate insert

title: [v1.2.0] [Database] Create decoupled Company entity and add auto-migrations
body:
### User Story
As a Product Manager, I want company metrics separated from job listings so that ratings and organizational health indicators are cached per company.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `Company` model declared in `core/models.py`
- [ ] Foreign key `company_id` linked from `JobListing` to `Company`
- [ ] Startup migration logic implemented in `api/main.py` to auto-add `company_id` to SQLite table without losing data

title: [v1.2.0] [AI & Insights] Implement Gemini structured insights enrichment
body:
### User Story
As a job seeker, I want the system to search DuckDuckGo and use Gemini to extract Glassdoor, Levels.fyi, and Layoffs info so that I can screen companies.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] DuckDuckGo searches executed for ratings, compensation, and layoff queries
- [ ] `CompanyInsightsSchema` defined in `core/enricher.py` using Pydantic
- [ ] Gemini API (`gemini-2.5-flash`) extracts structured JSON matching the Pydantic schema using Structured Outputs (Zero Regex)
- [ ] `Company` records updated with rating, average salary, and layoff alert

title: [v1.2.0] [Ingestion] Implement direct target company portals & merging
body:
### User Story
As a user, I want the crawler to prioritize direct company careers pages over aggregators when duplicate listings are found so that I can apply directly.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Ingest jobs from both aggregators and direct companies (configured in `target_companies.json`)
- [ ] Merge pipeline implemented in `tasks.py`: if a duplicate is found and the incoming job is direct, overwrite source URL and description to direct source
- [ ] Retain aggregator listing if the direct scraper fails (no data loss)

title: [v1.5.0] [AI] Extract skills from descriptions & calculate resume matching score
body:
### User Story
As a user, I want an LLM to extract required skills and calculate a match score against my resume profile so that I can prioritize applications.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Gemini API parses raw descriptions to extract list of technical and soft skills
- [ ] Resume parsed and compared semantically against job skills requirements
- [ ] Job listings populated with `skills_extracted` and `match_score` values

title: [v1.2.0] [Scrapers] Implement TargetCompanySpider for Greenhouse & Lever ATS APIs
body:
### User Story
As a developer, I want a single unified spider to crawl target companies using Greenhouse and Lever public board APIs so that I don't have to build custom DOM scrapers for each site.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Identify and map companies in `target_companies.json` to Greenhouse/Lever board identifiers
- [ ] Create `TargetCompanySpider` in `spiders/target_company.py` that queries Greenhouse API (`boards-api.greenhouse.io`) and Lever API (`api.lever.co`)
- [ ] Normalize output format and integrate it inside `workers/tasks.py`
- [ ] Filter jobs by user-defined keywords in-memory before yielding results
